rationale: Coinglass provides funding rate and open interest data for RNDR perpetuals, but real-time/current values require a paid API or logged-in session; correlation calculations require downloading 30-day OHLCV time-series for RNDR, BTC, ETH, and NASDAQ and computing Pearson coefficients — raw price data is freely available via CoinGecko /coins/{id}/market_chart but the computation itself must be performed client-side and cannot be 'pulled' as a pre-computed fact from any free public endpoint.
sources: https://www.coinglass.com/en/coins/render — funding rate & OI page (values gated behind login/paid tier for live data)
https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/NASDAQCOM — NASDAQ Composite daily closes (free, but 30-day correlation must be computed externally)
